original_image_tags: Handwritten note in blue ink in the upper right quadrant reads "O Flying Saucers".
Handwritten note in blue ink in the left margin reads "file" with two vertical strokes beneath it.
Handwritten note in blue ink in the lower left quadrant reads "6 28" over a red circle.
Handwritten note in red ink in the lower right quadrant is a large looped symbol, possibly a "B" or "8".
Faint blue pencil markings in the center of the page, possibly "nr: 986... 102... ICE... CT" and other illegible characters.
Purple date stamp in lower right quadrant: "NOV 24 1954"
Handwritten signature in black ink over the date stamp: "Edw Mossburg"
Below signature, handwritten in blue ink: "DIV page 2" and stamped in blue ink "INVESTIGATIVE"
Handwritten note in black ink in lower left: "27292"
Handwritten note in black ink in lower left margin: "58 DEC 7 - 1954"
Black ink stamp in lower right margin, partially illegible, contains "EC" and "File 8-11"

elements.description: A typed United States Government Office Memorandum addressed to Director, FBI, dated 11/22/54, regarding 'CIVILIAN RESEARCH, INTERPLANETARY FLYING OBJECTS'. Includes multiple handwritten annotations, stamps, and checkmarks.

judge.reason: Description A details numerous specific handwritten annotations, stamps, and ink markings, while Description B omits all visual content and only describes a typed memorandum, resulting in a complete contradiction on what is visually depicted.
